alkylation reagent: alkylation with 40 mM IAM for 45 min in the dark.
alkylation concentration: alkylation with 40 mM IAM for 45 min in the dark.
cleavage agent: in-solution digestion was performed with a Trypsin/LysC mixture.
instrument: imaged on a timsTOF flex in positive-ion mode.
ionization type: Matrix-assisted laser desorption/ionization (MALDI) mass spectrometry imaging.
reduction reagent: reduced with 20 mM DTT for 45 min.
reduction concentration: reduced with 20 mM DTT for 45 min.
